name: Orange Almond Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Green, red or yellow pepper, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook hot cooked rice.
2. Combine onion, pepper strips, snow peas, ginger and garlic in a 6 cup microwaveable casserole. Cover and microwave on high for 3-4 minutes or until softened. Stir or shake dish once part way through cooking.
3. Meanwhile, drain salmon juices into a small dish and add stock, orange juice, lemon juice, cornstarch and 5 spice powder. Stir until smooth.
4. Break up salmon, discarding bones. Stir sauce mixture into vegetables.
5. Cover and microwave on high for 2-3 minutes or until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens slightly. Stir at least once during cooking.
6. Add salmon and microwave, covered, on high for 1 minute or until heated through.
7. Garnish with almonds and serve over rice.
